title: Partition String Into Substrings With Values at Most K
titleCn: 将字符串分割成值不超过 K 的子字符串

testcases.input: s = "165462", k = 60 Output: 4 Explanation: We can partition the string into substrings "16", "54", "6", and "2". Each substring has a value less than or equal to k = 60. It can be shown that we cannot partition the string into less than 4 substrings.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: We can partition the string into substrings "16", "54", "6", and "2". Each substring has a value less than or equal to k = 60. It can be shown that we cannot partition the string into less than 4 substrings.

testcases.input: s = "238182", k = 5 Output: -1 Explanation: There is no good partition for this string.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no good partition for this string.
